# Media Scanner


<!-- WARNING: THIS FILE WAS AUTOGENERATED! DO NOT EDIT! -->

## MediaScanner Class

Scans configured directories for audio and video files. Supports caching
to avoid repeated filesystem access and filtering by media type.

href="https://github.com/cj-mills/cjm-fasthtml-workflow-transcription-single-file/blob/main/cjm_fasthtml_workflow_transcription_single_file/media/scanner.py#L20"

### MediaScanner

>  MediaScanner (config:cjm_fasthtml_workflow_transcription_single_file.medi
>                    a.config.MediaConfig)

*Scans directories for media files with instance-level caching.*
